title: SPC Flooring
shortDescription: 100% waterproof, 6mm ultra-durable Cobra Gold SPC flooring with real wood grain texture for luxury homes and offices in Delhi NCR.
longDescription:
Transform your living and working spaces with Goals Floors' premium Cobra Gold SPC (Stone Plastic Composite) Flooring. Engineered specifically for the demanding climate and modern lifestyle of Gurugram and Delhi NCR, this flooring combines the stunning, authentic aesthetics of natural hardwood with absolute water resistance and ultimate structural durability.

Unlike traditional laminate or real wood that swells and warps with moisture, our Cobra Gold SPC features a rigid stone-polymer core. It boasts a heavy-duty 0.5mm wear layer, making it completely scratch-resistant and perfect for high-traffic areas like retail stores in Cyber City, corporate offices, and luxury residential apartments. With its advanced Uniclick interlocking system, installation is fast, mess-free, and seamless.

features.title: 100% Waterproof & Termite Proof
features.description: The stone-polymer core absorbs zero moisture. It will never swell, warp, or attract termites, making it perfect for kitchens and basements.

features.title: 0.5mm Commercial Wear Layer
features.description: Engineered for heavy foot traffic. The thick transparent wear layer protects against scratches, dents, and stains from kids and pets.

features.title: EIR - Real Wood Grain Texture
features.description: Features Embossed-In-Register (EIR) technology, ensuring the physical texture exactly matches the visual wood grain for a hyper-realistic feel.

features.title: Uniclick Installation System
features.description: Rapid, glue-less installation. The precision-milled Uniclick joints seamlessly lock together, ensuring a flawless, gap-free finish.

features.title: V-Groove Painted Edges
features.description: Each plank features a subtle, painted V-groove edge, enhancing the authentic hardwood plank aesthetic once installed.

features.title: Acoustic Comfort & Fire Retardant
features.description: Reduces hollow footfall sounds compared to standard tiles and is manufactured with strict Class B1 fire retardant properties.

installation: Extremely fast, dry installation. The subfloor must be flat, clean, and dry. An acoustic underlay is laid down first, and then the SPC planks are simply clicked together using the Uniclick system. No messy glues or heavy machinery required. Skirting and T-profiles are used for a neat edge finish.
maintenance: Virtually maintenance-free. Sweep or vacuum regularly. For deep cleaning, use a damp mop with a pH-neutral floor cleaner. Never use steam cleaners, abrasive scrubbers, or flooding the floor with water.

faqs.question: Why is SPC Flooring better than traditional Laminate Flooring?
faqs.answer: SPC (Stone Plastic Composite) has a stone core, making it 100% waterproof and termite-proof. Traditional laminate has a wood-dust (HDF) core which swells if exposed to water. SPC is also more stable in extreme temperatures, making it ideal for Delhi NCR.

faqs.question: Can Cobra Gold SPC flooring be installed in kitchens and bathrooms?
faqs.answer: It is highly recommended for kitchens due to its 100% waterproof nature and scratch resistance. However, for wet areas like bathroom shower floors, ceramic tiles are still the standard.

faqs.question: Is SPC flooring safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. The 0.5mm commercial wear layer makes it highly resistant to pet scratches. It is also non-toxic, Formaldehyde-free, and easy to sanitize, making it perfect for kids and pets.

faqs.question: Do you supply wholesale SPC flooring to builders in Gurugram?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a premier wholesale distributor. We provide tiered B2B pricing, immediate warehouse dispatch, and dedicated support for architects and interior contractors across the NCR region.

faqs.question: Can SPC be installed over my existing marble or tile floor?
faqs.answer: Yes! As long as your existing tile or marble floor is flat, even, and solid, SPC flooring can be installed directly over it without any demolition, saving you immense time and labor costs.

faqs.question: What does the 0.5mm Wear Layer mean?
faqs.answer: The wear layer is the clear protective coating on top of the design. Standard residential SPC uses 0.3mm. Our 0.5mm wear layer is 'Commercial Grade', meaning it can withstand heavy traffic in offices, cafes, and busy homes without wearing out.

faqs.question: Do I need to buy extra accessories with the flooring?
faqs.answer: To get a professional finish, you will need matching accessories. 'Skirting' covers the wall expansion gap, 'T-Profiles' are used for doorways, and 'Reducers' seamlessly connect the SPC to lower floors (like tiles).

faqs.question: How long does the installation take?
faqs.answer: Because of the Uniclick system, it is extremely fast. A standard 3-bedroom apartment can usually be fully floored in just 1 to 2 days without any dust, smell, or wet cement.

faqs.question: Will SPC flooring make a hollow clicking sound when walking?
faqs.answer: While rigid floors naturally have some acoustics, our SPC flooring is installed over a premium IXPE/EVA underlayment which significantly dampens footfall noise, providing a quiet, comfortable walk.

faqs.question: How do I maintain the 'Real Wood Grain' EIR texture?
faqs.answer: Maintenance is effortless. The EIR texture doesn't trap dirt easily. Regular sweeping and occasional mopping with a damp microfiber cloth is all that's required to keep it looking brand new.

installationSteps.title: Subfloor Prep
points: Floor must be level within 3/16 inch
Ensure subfloor is dry and dust-free

installationSteps.title: Uniclick Installation
points: Angle board at 30° into the joint
Use tapping block for invisible joints
